conditions.message: The policy keeps autonomous closure bounded: mutating git commit requires explicit confirmation, robots require confirm:true plus a message, admin closure cannot fabricate delivery evidence, and drift is advisory rather than automatic proof.
evidence: Safe Delivery Order step 9 says git commit runs only with explicit confirmation; interactive default is No; robots require confirm:true plus a message.
Admin work section says admin closure does not require code attestation evidence and must not ask agents to fabricate one.
Drift Check section says burpvalve beads drift is advisory and does not prove that a dirty file belongs to a bead.
The AGENTS template clause permits admin-only .beads housekeeping to batch only when no delivery payload is staged, while delivery beads close through the Burpvalve gate.
